candidates.why: Primary operating revenue line; matches petroleum company’s top-line sales.
Liability, not a revenue flow; inappropriate for REVT.
Adjustment/balancing row rather than the main revenue figure.
Explicit balancing item; not the substantive revenue line.

variables.notes: Petroleum revenues clearly represents total operating revenue; other options are balancing/deferral items.
No suitable cost of sales / production cost row was provided in the candidate list, so COGS is left empty by rule.

candidates.why: Represents operating income, not SG&A expense; should not be classified as SG&A.
Also operating income, not overhead expense; not appropriate for SG&A.
Overhead-type operating expenses consistent with SG&A definition (excluding D&A/impairments).
Classic SG&A component (administrative overhead).

variables.notes: Selected only expense-type overhead lines; excluded income lines from SG&A per instructions.

candidates.why: Explicitly labeled research & development expense.
Core interest expense on debt; primary component of interest expense.
Likely a total, but components (interest on debts and borrowings, interest on lease debt) are available and preferred by rule.
Interest expense related to lease liabilities; part of total interest expense.
Capitalized, not expensed interest; should be excluded from XINT.

candidates.row_label: Change in fair value of interest rate hedges (ineffectiveness)
candidates.why: Derivative fair value effect, not pure interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; may duplicate ‘Interest on lease debt’. Prefer main P&L line.
Balance sheet liability, not an expense flow.

candidates.row_label: Interest-bearing loans and borrowings excluding financial lease
candidates.why: Balance sheet liability, not an expense flow.
Balance sheet payable, not period interest expense.

variables.notes: Used the main component expense lines; excluded totals, capitalized interest, hedge ineffectiveness, and balance-sheet items.

candidates.why: Component of equity, not total book equity.
Total shareholders’ equity; valid measure of book equity.
Represents total equity/book value; essentially same as shareholders’ equity total and is the clean total-equity figure.
Balancing adjustment, not substantive equity total.
Balancing item, not the primary equity figure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing item for the accounting identity, not equity itself.
Represents total assets/liabilities+equity, not equity alone.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit overall equity total rather than subtotals or balancing lines.
No minority interest / non-controlling interest line is present in the candidate list, so MIB is set to empty.
